headline: A Look At Northrop Grumman (NOC) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent performance snapshot and context Northrop Grumman (NOC) has drawn investor attention recently, with the share price at $724.03 and total return figures over the past year and past 3 years shaping sentiment around this large US$104.4b defense contractor. See our latest analysis for Northrop Grumman. Recent trading has been a little softer, with a 1.6% one day share price decline and a modest pullback over the week.
